---
title: "print_actions_steps"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd) | [View source](https://codeberg.org/usrbinr/ti/src/branch/main/R/utils-misc.R#L123)

# `print_actions_steps()`

Print action steps

## Usage

```r
print_actions_steps(x)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `x` | an S7 class |

## Value

cli messages
